top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde leaves door open to early ECB exit, as she mulls French politics
top_signals.summary: The European Central Bank's Christine Lagarde has declined to rule out an early end to her term as president, as she mulls a foray into French politics.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Top official recuses herself from NHS Palantir contract decision after business links
top_signals.summary: MPs had raised concerns over Samantha Jones’s previous consulting work
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Taking the measure of the UK as a financial service centre
top_signals.summary: Turning a data-fuelled quantitative international ranking project into a thing about London
